K1C K1C_MOUTH_PAIN (K1C) Mouth Pain CHAR 1 Oral/nutritional status: oral problems - mouth pain. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
380 K1D K1D_NONE_ABOVE (K1D) None of Above Oral Problems CHAR 1 Oral/nutritional status: oral problems - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
381 K2A K2A_HEIGHT (K2A) Height CHAR 2 Oral/nutritional status: height and weight - height (inches).
382 K2B K2B_WEIGHT (K2B) Weight CHAR 3 Oral/nutritional status: height and weight - weight (pounds).
383 K3A
